message.content: ```plantuml abstract class Duck { <> + public abstract void display() - void quack() - void swim() - void fly() } class WildDuck { <> - void display() } class PekingDuck { <> - void display() - void fly() } class ToyDuck { <> - void display() - void quack() - void swim() - void fly() } WildDuck --|> Duck PekingDuck --|> Duck ToyDuck --|> Duck skinparam packageStyle rectangle skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam roundcorner 10 skinparam shadowing false skinparam monochrome true skinparam linetype ortho skinparam backgroundColor #FEFEFE skinparam defaultFontName Arial skinparam defaultFontSize 18 skinparam defaultFontColor black skinparam handwritten false skinparam legend { backgroundcolor white bordercolor black fontcolor black fontsize 16 fontname Arial Legend == Class Types == [<> Abstract] as A [<> Concrete] as C } ```
